# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const MAX_CONTENT_SIZE = 1024 * 1024 * 10;
const MAX_HEADER_SIZE = 8192;
const RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 100;
const RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 60000;

const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();

const ALLOWED_HEADERS = [
  'content-type',
  'cache-control',
  'x-custom-header',
  'x-stream-id',
];

const BLOCKED_PATTERNS = [
  /<script[^>]*>.*?<\/script>/gi,
  /javascript:/gi,
  /on\w+\s*=/gi,
  /<iframe/gi,
  /eval\(/gi,
  /expression\(/gi,
];

function sanitizeContent(content: string): string {
  let sanitized = content;
  for (const pattern of BLOCKED_PATTERNS) {
    sanitized = sanitized.replace(pattern, '');
  }
  return sanitized;
}

function validateHeaders(headers: Record<string, string>): Record<string, string> {
  const validated: Record<string, string> = {};
  
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers)) {
    const lowerKey = key.toLowerCase();
    
    if (!ALLOWED_HEADERS.includes(lowerKey)) {
      continue;
    }
    
    if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.length > 1024) {
      continue;
    }
    
    const sanitizedValue = value.replace(/[\r\n]/g, '');
    validated[lowerKey] = sanitizedValue;
  }
  
  return validated;
}

function checkRateLimit(identifier: string): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const record = rateLimitMap.get(identifier);
  
  if (!record || now > record.resetTime) {
    rateLimitMap.set(identifier, {
      count: 1,
      resetTime: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW,
    });
    return true;
  }
  
  if (record.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {
    return false;
  }
  
  record.count++;
  return true;
}

function getClientIdentifier(request: NextRequest): string {
  const forwarded = request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for');
  const ip = forwarded ? forwarded.split(',')[0].trim() : 'unknown';
  return ip;
}

export default async function handler(request: NextRequest) {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    return new NextResponse('Method not allowed', { status: 405 });
  }
  
  const clientId = getClientIdentifier(request);
  
  if (!checkRateLimit(clientId)) {
    return new NextResponse('Rate limit exceeded', { status: 429 });
  }
  
  let body;
  try {
    const text = await request.text();
    
    if (text.length > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
      return new NextResponse('Content too large', { status: 413 });
    }
    
    body = JSON.parse(text);
  } catch (error) {
    return new NextResponse('Invalid JSON', { status: 400 });
  }
  
  if (!body || typeof body !== 'object') {
    return new NextResponse('Invalid request body', { status: 400 });
  }
  
  const { content, headers: userHeaders, chunkSize = 64, delay = 0 } = body;
  
  if (!content || typeof content !== 'string') {
    return new NextResponse('Content is required and must be a string', { status: 400 });
  }
  
  if (content.length > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
    return new NextResponse('Content exceeds maximum size', { status: 413 });
  }
  
  const sanitizedContent = sanitizeContent(content);
  
  const validatedHeaders = userHeaders && typeof userHeaders === 'object'
    ? validateHeaders(userHeaders)
    : {};
  
  const headerSize = JSON.stringify(validatedHeaders).length;
  if (headerSize > MAX_HEADER_SIZE) {
    return new NextResponse('Headers too large', { status: 431 });
  }
  
  const safeChunkSize = Math.min(Math.max(1, Number(chunkSize) || 64), 1024);
  const safeDelay = Math.min(Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0), 1000);
  
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  
  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (let i = 0; i < sanitizedContent.length; i += safeChunkSize) {
          const chunk = sanitizedContent.slice(i, i + safeChunkSize);
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
          
          if (safeDelay > 0 && i + safeChunkSize < sanitizedContent.length) {
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, safeDelay));
          }
        }
        controller.close();
      } catch (error) {
        controller.error(error);
      }
    },
  });
  
  const responseHeaders = new Headers({
    'Content-Type': validatedHeaders['content-type'] || 'text/plain',
    'Cache-Control': validatedHeaders['cache-control'] || 'no-cache',
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
    'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
    'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains',
  });
  
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(validatedHeaders)) {
    if (key !== 'content-type' && key !== 'cache-control') {
      responseHeaders.set(key, value);
    }
  }
  
  return new Response(stream, {
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
